title: Ant Control in Floral Park | Professional Ant Extermination $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional ant control services in Floral Park, Long Island. Expert ant extermination for homes and businesses. Same-day service available. Call now for $350-$550 treatment.
intro: Floral Park's charming tree-lined streets and well-maintained homes deserve protection from persistent ant infestations. Our professional ant control services provide Floral Park residents with effective, long-lasting solutions to eliminate carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants. With treatments ranging from $350 to $550, we offer comprehensive ant extermination tailored to your property's specific needs.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Floral Park and the surrounding Long Island communities for years, understanding the unique pest challenges that affect homes near the Belmont Park area and throughout this historic village. Our licensed technicians use eco-friendly products safe for families and pets while delivering guaranteed results that keep your Floral Park home ant-free year-round.
localContext: Floral Park's mature oak and maple trees, vintage Tudor and Colonial homes, and proximity to both NYC and Nassau County create ideal conditions for ant colonies to thrive, especially during Long Island's humid summers. From properties along Tulip Avenue to homes near Centennial Gardens, we protect Floral Park's diverse residential architecture from structural damage and contamination caused by invasive ant species.

faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Floral Park homes?
faqs.answer: Floral Park properties most frequently experience carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in older homes. Our inspection identifies the specific species and entry points to create a targeted treatment plan for your property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide ant control service in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day ant control services for Floral Park residents. Most treatments are completed within 1-2 hours, and you'll notice a significant reduction in ant activity within 24-48 hours. We're conveniently located to serve all Floral Park neighborhoods promptly.

faqs.question: Is the ant treatment safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved, family-safe ant control products that are highly effective yet low-toxicity. Our technicians apply treatments strategically in targeted areas, and we provide specific guidelines for re-entry. Most treatments allow families and pets to return to treated areas within 2-4 hours of application.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 ant control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive ant control service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of ant species and nesting sites, interior and exterior treatment application, entry point sealing recommendations, and a 30-day follow-up guarantee. Pricing varies based on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency needed for complete elimination.
